name: agentproof
description: AgentProof local M3 MVP with CLI, web UI, and Windows desktop shell.
author: kyrieouhan

scripts.demo:install: cd samples/demo-web-app && corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && corepack pnpm run prisma:generate
scripts.lint: node --check bin/agentproof.mjs && node --check src/runtime-paths.mjs && node --check src/runner-profile.mjs && node --check src/docker-preflight.mjs && node --check src/docker-runner.mjs && node --check src/runner-policy.mjs && node --check src/domain/status.mjs && node --check src/domain/schemas.mjs && node --check src/domain/acceptance-versions.mjs && node --check src/domain/assertions.mjs && node --check src/domain/test-data.mjs && node --check src/domain/redaction.mjs && node --check src/domain/manifest.mjs && node --check src/domain/report.mjs && node --check src/domain/browser-flow.mjs && node --check src/domain/browser-evidence.mjs && node --check src/domain/joined-assertions.mjs && node --check src/domain/diff-risk.mjs && node --check src/domain/readonly-rules.mjs && node --check src/domain/hardcoded-detection.mjs && node --check src/web/server.mjs && node --check src/web/static/app.js && node --check desktop/config.mjs && node --check desktop/demo-assets.mjs && node --check desktop/logger.mjs && node --check desktop/main.mjs && node --check desktop/preload.mjs && node --check desktop/process-launcher.mjs && node --check scripts/run-m1-repeatability.mjs && node --check scripts/run-m1-isolation-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-domain-schemas.mjs && node --check scripts/run-m2-demo-regression.mjs && node --check scripts/run-m3-browser-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/run-m3-diff-risk-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/run-m3-hardcoded-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/run-m3-regression.mjs && node --check scripts/start-web.mjs && node --check scripts/run-m3-web-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/run-desktop-smoke.mjs
